# 🗺️ Product & Portfolio Roadmap | خارطة طريق الأعمال والمنصة

This is the living roadmap for my unified portfolio, agency operations, and the **AIR** (AI-native Next.js) platform. We use this space to track key milestones, feature rollouts, and community suggestions.

هذه هي خارطة الطريق المستمرة لأعمالي، وعمليات الاستوديو، ومنصة **AIR** المتقدمة. نستخدم هذه الصفحة لمتابعة المحطات الرئيسية، وإطلاق الميزات الجديدة، ومقترحات مجتمع المطورين والمستفيدين.

---

## 🚦 Status Indicators | مؤشرات الحالة
* 🔴 **Planned / مخطط له** — Future milestones and ideas.
* 🟡 **In Progress / قيد العمل** — Active development/implementation.
* 🟢 **Completed / مكتمل** — Rolled out and verified.

---

## 🎯 Active Milestones | المحطات النشطة

### 1. Unified Brand & Identity Hub (ahmedissamramadan.github.io)
* 🟢 **Bilingual Support (Arabic/English)** — Dynamic RTL/LTR layout toggling.
* 🟢 **Responsive Design & Modern Glassmorphism** — Tailored obsidian & gold styling.
* 🟢 **Narrative Case Studies Migration** — Full 5-stage Arabic design frameworks integrated.
* 🟢 **Direct Contact Form** — Streamlined intake producing direct WhatsApp API queries.
* 🟡 **GitHub Pages Auto-deployment** — Active hosting at `ahmedissamramadan.github.io`.

### 2. AIR (AI-Native Web Platform) Core Stability
* 🟢 **Codebase Recovery** — Restored 225 files of Next.js project on `main` branch.
* 🟢 **Deduplication of Assets** — Cleaned up heavy image directories into unified structure.
* 🟡 **Integrations Check** — Validating n8n triggers and webhooks for media systems.
* 🔴 **Academy Launch** — Releasing specialized guides on AI Brand Systems and Advanced Prompts.

### 3. Workflow Automations & AI Pipelines (VentureCycle Studio)
* 🟡 **Lead Nurturing Workflow** — Connecting contact intake form to backend CRM via n8n.
* 🔴 **ComfyUI API Connectors** — Deploying automated visual assets generators directly in AIR.
* 🔴 **Multi-Agent Branding Co-pilot** — Integrating Gemini-powered brand analysis helper.

---

## 🤝 How to Contribute | كيف تشارك في التطوير؟
If you have suggestions, spotted a bug, or want to discuss a custom system implementation, please open an issue using one of our templates:
* 💼 **[Service Inquiry]** for business automation or brand design.
* 💡 **[Improvement Suggestion]** for new feature requests.
* 🐛 **[Bug Report]** for visual glitches or technical faults.

إذا كان لديك اقتراح، أو واجهت مشكلة برمجية، أو ترغب في مناقشة بناء أنظمة مخصصة لشركتك، يرجى فتح تذكرة (Issue) جديدة باستخدام أحد النماذج المتاحة.
